text.title: Audience-Driven Pivot Decision Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Audience-Driven Pivot Decision output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: audience_health populated with a typed value
candidate_products populated with a typed value
validation_test populated with a typed value
sunset_plan populated with a typed value
review_date populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
